\tzpentry{ID4698}{Gyromagnetic Berry Phase}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4698 introduces Gyromagnetic Berry Phase as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\\lambda_g = \\frac{\\mu_0 \\gamma_\\text{gyro}}{c_s} \\left(\\frac{\\partial \\chi_m}{\\partial \\rho}\\right)\n\\end{equation}
